name: Temple Gold Jhumka
description: Inspired by the intricate carvings of South Indian temple gopurams, these jhumkas carry centuries of craft in every detail. Hand-engraved in 22kt gold with a cascading bell drop, they catch the light with every movement. Comes in a signature Laame Jewels silk box.
careInstructions: Store in the provided pouch. Avoid contact with perfumes and water. Polish gently with a soft cloth.
shipping: Ships within 3–5 business days. Free shipping on orders above ₹1000.
returns: Returns accepted within 7 days in original, unworn condition with intact packaging.
